arts.ttl: Chelsea defender Ben Chilwell set to undergo medical at Crystal Palace ahead of six-month loan move to the Eagles
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Ben Chilwell will have a medical tomorrow at Crystal Palace once the final details are ironed out on a six month loan deal.

arts.ttl: Palace believed 'great win' would happen - Glasner
arts.sum: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner says his side believed that their "great win" would happen against Manchester United at Old Trafford in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford breaks his silence on leaving Man United for Aston Villa on loan and reveals why he joined Unai Emery's side
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has broken his silence on leaving boyhood club Manchester United after his completing his loan move to Aston Villa, 24 hours out from the winter deadline.

arts.ttl: Palace agree deal with Chelsea for Chilwell loan
arts.sum: Crystal Palace have agreed a deal with Chelsea to sign Ben Chilwell on loan for rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Man Utd in bombshell battle as Chelsea eye €90m deal: FT recap
arts.sum: Plus, Chelsea are interested in a wonderkid valued at €90 million and Aston Villa wrapped up a deal to sign Man Utd outcast Marcus Rashford. However, within two hours, the deal had collapsed as Bayern rejected two bids, prompting the two clubs to stop the negotiations and seemingly leaving Arsenal in pole position to sign him.

arts.ttl: Villa announce Marcus Rashford loan signing
arts.sum: Aston Villa is delighted to announce the loan signing of Marcus Rashford from Manchester United. The England international, capped 60 times by the Three Lions, joins Villa on a deal until the end of the season. Rashford has scored 138 goals in over 400 appearances having come through the ranks at Old Trafford and has lifted the Europa League, two FA Cups and two League Cups with his boyhood club. The versatile forward, who can play anywhere along the front line, has also netted 17 goals in an England shirt and has represented his country at two World Cups and two European Championships. Welcome, Marcus! 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁥󠁮󠁧󠁿

arts.ttl: 'Glitch in the matrix' - can Dorgu solve Man Utd's problem?
arts.sum: Manchester United hope Patrick Dorgu will be the wing-back Ruben Amorim has been desperate for.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace now holding talks to sign £35m player in transfer deadline day deal - journalist
Man Utd Transfer News Today: Tel madness overshadows Dorgu arrival
arts.sum: Man Utd Transfer News Today: Tel madness overshadows Dorgu arrival Man Utd will now pursue different targets and a rather surprising name that has emerged on their radar is Leon Bailey of Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim insists Man United are 'trying everything' to bring in a striker before the window closes after 2-0 defeat to Crystal Palace
arts.sum: NATHAN SALT AT OLD TRAFFORD: Ruben Amorim vowed that Man United will do 'everything' they can to bring a striker in before Monday's 11pm transfer deadline.
